title: helichrysum milleri
intro: Helichrysum milleri, also known as the Mountain Everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum milleri can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
